group_1.textRight: Here for a guerrilla live performance.

group_1.textLeft: [chara:800400:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!

group_1.textRight: What!? W-why are you saying that?!

group_1.textLeft: Because... Everyone is worn out
from all the desperate struggling with their worries,@aren't they?
Not being able to eat anything or drink water on@top of regretting they way they've lived―
Their depressed hearts are how the Witch took@advantage of them...
But now they're trying to overcome that and move@forward.
So if I don't cheer them up by singing here and now,
then I don't know what it means to be an idol@anymore~!
It's SayuSayu...!
This, this is SayuSayu―!

group_1.textCenter: Everyooone~, good eveniiing―!
It's Kamihama's own sword idol, SayuSayu heeere~!
Right now, our Kamihama is in a vee~eery difficult@time.
But together, we'll cheer up!@Let's slash our way throuuugh~!
The guerrilla concert live from the center of East@Kamihama is about to begin, begin, begin~!

group_1.narration: "A live concert..."@"But this isn't the time to be listening to songs..."@"I was about to die just moments ago..."

group_1.textCenter: Please don't say things like that, and listen to me~
The song you're about to hear is a new,@unreleased song by SayuSayu.
This song is filled with my hopes@and wishes to reach out
and get close to the feelings@of as many people as possible.
But the title is the only thing I couldn't think of.
I was even working so hard late today.
But just now I decided on a title!
So I have a request for all of you:
To grant me my wish to get close to as many people@as possible...
Record this concert with your smartphones
and please share it
to everyone suffering in Kamihama~!

group_1.narration: "Eh...would that be okay...?"@"Even though it's...a new unreleased song...?"

group_1.textCenter: And now please listen.@"#I'm Like You, I'm With You."

group_1.textRight: Aren't live concerts just hella exciting!

group_1.textCenter: You wouldn't even think they were just trying@to drown themselves moments ago...

group_1.textLeft: Is this also...the power of Sayuki-senpai's magic,@you think?

group_1.textCenter: Who knows...
It could just be the charms of an idol.

group_1.textRight: Rui, that was great what you did back there.
You said "there's still hope" earlier,
and I think that led to everyone becoming@convinced after that.
...I know you didn't want to say it, though...

group_1.textLeft: I-it was nothing...
Besides, those people only stopped because the@Witch was defeated,
so convincing them was pointless to begin with...

group_1.textRight: For saying something so pointless@you sure did great!

group_1.textLeft: S-Seira...
By the way, um...@All you SayuSayu companions here...

group_1.textCenter: [chara:305600:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!
Y-yes...what is it...?

group_1.textLeft: Your costumes are kinda wild...

group_1.textRight: (Oof, he noticed...?!)
(And all because they calmed down@and recovered so fast...)

group_1.textLeft: Are you guys...@Some SayuSayu groupies...?
'Cause your costumes are kinda similar to@SayuSayu's style.

group_1.textCenter: ...S-something like that...

group_1.textLeft: If you are, you almost got it!
SayuSayu loves swords, not scythes!

group_1.textCenter: E-excuse me, I'm just on the bandwagon...
(O-otakuuu...!)

group_1.textRight: Well, if he's in that good of spirits,@I guess that's a relief.

group_1.textLeft: I-incredible! Just as I expected,@Sayuki-senpai is the star of the city!

group_1.textRight: What's up?!

group_1.textLeft: "#I'm Like You, I'm With You" is third in trending@for the Kamihama region.

group_1.textRight: Sweet! For reals!
It's because everyone at the concert is putting@it all over the net,
and people who see the posts are quoting@to give their thoughts.

group_1.narration: SayuSayu's doing a guerrilla live concert!@And it's a new song! Crazy!@The title is #I'm Like You, I'm With You.@www.doutu.be~~
I saw SayuSayu's guerrilla live concert video!@She's hungry and thirsty, but she's still giving it her all!@I'm pumped up too!@#I'm Like You, I'm With You

group_1.textRight: Look!

group_1.textLeft: Huh...? Now that I think about it, this tag...
It's very relevant...to the petition, isn't it...?
It really is!

group_1.textRight: We said it ourselves, didn't we?
We're the same.

group_1.textLeft: Indeed, and that is our saving@grace when we lose our way,
the words that encourage us to move forward.
T-then... Using this hashtag,
together with a link to the petition...
We might catch the eyes of tons of people in@Kamihama!
Already said and done.

group_1.textRight: That was quick!

group_1.textLeft: [chara:303600:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!
She's right―!
The number of people accessing the site is flying up!

group_1.textRight: Yippee!
It really worked out...

group_1.textLeft: Yeah!
